mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM hf_role r INNER JOIN hf_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT p.perm_code FROM hf_permission p INNER JOIN hf_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.perm_id INNER JOIN hf_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
